prompts: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '" + user_id + "'
notes: Mocked Gemini + mocked attackers — framework overhead only. Real upstream calls add Gemini (<=10s) + attacker max(latency) in parallel. Target p50 <= 60s for 100-line input is framework-overhead bounded; vendor-call latency is upstream-dependent and tracked by individual VendorAdapter timings.
